description: Install dependencies and verify the existing brand package builds, typechecks, and tests pass as a baseline.
steps: Run `pnpm install` from /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem to install all workspace deps.
Run `pnpm --filter @quant/brand typecheck` and confirm zero errors.
Run `pnpm --filter @quant/brand test` and confirm all existing tests pass.
Run `pnpm --filter @quant/brand lint` and confirm no lint errors.
If any step fails, fix the issue in packages/brand/ only (do NOT touch other packages).
acceptance_criteria: pnpm --filter @quant/brand test exits 0 with all tests passing
findings: Baseline verified: typecheck 0 errors, 12/12 tests pass, lint clean. pnpm install takes ~14s with 1045 packages. No code changes needed.
